zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Vermandois於大約1071年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois15歲，母親Adélaïde de Vermandois13歲。她與Raoul Ier de Beaugency在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於從1130年到1180年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Vermandois于大约1071年出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois15岁，母亲Adélaïde de Vermandois13岁。她与Raoul Ier de Beaugency在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于从1130年到1180年在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Vermandois was born about 1071, in Brittany, France, her father, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, was 15 and her mother, Adélaïde de Vermandois, was 13. She married Raoul Ier de Beaugency in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died from 1130 to 1180, in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Vermandois est née environ 1071, à Bretagne, France, son père, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de Vermandois, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul Ier de Beaugency à Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée du 1130 au 1180, à Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Vermandois um 1071 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois 15 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde de Vermandois 13. Sie hat in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich Raoul Ier de Beaugency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb von 1130 bis 1180 in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Vermandois è nata il circa 1071 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Adélaïde de Vermandois, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Raoul Ier de Beaugency nel Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 1130 a 1180, nel Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Vermandoisが約1071年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandoisは15歳，母Adélaïde de Vermandoisは13歳であった。フランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトビーウジェンシでRaoul Ier de Beaugencyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1130年まで1180年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトビーウジェンシで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Vermandois(이)가 대략 1071년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde de Vermandois(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시에서 Raoul Ier de Beaugency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 부터 1180년 까지 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Vermandois nasceu aproximadamente 1071, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de Vermandois, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul Ier de Beaugency em Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu de 1130 a 1180, em Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Vermandois родилась около 1071 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de Vermandois, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul Ier de Beaugency в местности бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла с 1130 по 1180 в местности бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Vermandois nació aproximadamente 1071, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Adélaïde de Vermandois, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Raoul Ier de Beaugency en Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 1130 hasta 1180, en Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia.
